title: KG-TRICK: Unifying Textual and Relational Information Completion of Knowledge for Multilingual Knowledge Graphs
research_areas: T13 Knowledge discovery/representation (knowledge graphs, linked data, terminologies, lexicons, ontologies, etc.)
T14 Language Modeling (including training, fine-tuning, representation learning, and generation of synthetic data)
T16 Machine Translation (including Speech-to-Speech) and Translation Aids
